title: Linear Stationary Model Identification and Modeling Process
description: A flowchart outlining the key steps and decisions involved in building a Linear Stationary Model for a time series, starting from raw data and ending with a validated forecasting model.
relationships: Process flow from one element to the next
Feedback loop from 'Diagnostic Checking' back to 'Apply Differencing' or 'Identify Model' if residuals are not white noise
